personality_one_liner: A premium, club-like template marketplace where neon accents and frosted glass over deep obsidian create an immersive, high-energy electronic vibe.

spacing.rule: Generous spacing. Use md/lg between cards, and xl for section breaks. The thumb zone must remain clear, and sticky CTA patterns must account for safe areas.

do's: Use over featured template hero cards with neon imagery underneath.
Apply to the bottom tab bar and sticky headers.
Ensure a translucent tinted base (>= 75% opacity) behind glass for readability.
Apply to 'Premium' status badges floating over thumbnails.
dont's: Never blur body text or form inputs.
Do not overdo glass on dense grid items; use solid surfaceSecondary for the regular templates.
Do not use glass without the underlying tint layer; readability is non-negotiable.

screens.name: Home
screens.purpose: Discover and download high-quality DJ light and Avee templates.

states.loading: Centered neon lime spinner over deep obsidian canvas.
states.empty: No templates available yet. Show an abstract geometric illustration with 'Check back later'.
states.error: Failed to load templates. 'Connection lost' with a Retry button.

screens.layout: Sticky glass header with a 'Free / Premium' segmented control. Beneath it, a 2-column masonry or wrap grid for template cards. Each card fills `(screenWidth - 2*lg - md) / 2`. Card contains: 1. Full-width thumbnail image at the top with a top-down gradient scrim. 2. A pill badge over the image (Premium/Free). 3. Title typography (Space Grotesk). 4. A primary download icon button (Phosphor) aligned bottom-right of the card.

screens.name: Template Detail
screens.purpose: Preview the template in high resolution and trigger the download.

states.loading: Skeleton of the hero image and title.

screens.layout: Edge-to-edge hero image at the top, fading into the `surface` via a strong vertical gradient scrim (transparent to 80% surface at the bottom of the image). Title and 'Premium' badge sit at the bottom of the scrim. Below the fold: Template description, file size, requirements. Sticky CTA at the screen root (bottom): 'Download Template' pinned above safe area inside a frosted glass container.

screens.name: Admin Dashboard
screens.purpose: Manage uploaded templates and initiate new uploads.

states.empty: No templates uploaded yet. CTA to 'Upload First Template'.

screens.layout: List view of all uploaded templates with quick edit/delete actions. Sticky FAB (Floating Action Button) with `brandPrimary` background and glass effect for 'Add New'.

screens.name: Admin Upload
screens.purpose: Form to upload file, thumbnail, title, type, and price.

states.error: Upload failed message with retry option.

screens.layout: Single column form inside a ScrollView wrapped in KeyboardAvoidingView. Labels above inputs. Image picker block at the top. 'Publish Instantly' sticky CTA anchored at the bottom.

screens.name: Settings
screens.purpose: Access app policies and contact information.
screens.layout: Simple list layout. Tinted icon containers (`brandTertiary` background) leading each list row. Chevrons on the right.

hero_featured.alt: Neon stage lights at a music festival

admin_dashboard_bg.alt: DJ sound mixing board with colorful lights

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the Dark-First layout combined with Luxe/Glass elements. The app must feel like a premium nightclub/electronic music experience.
Do NOT use any blue, indigo, or purple. The entire app must rely on deep obsidian backgrounds and the designated Neon Lime (`brandPrimary`: #c4fb6d) for accents.
For the Home screen 2-column grid: ensure cards use `surfaceSecondary` with `md` border radius. Wrap the cards correctly using `flexWrap` and `space-between` to avoid orphan layout bugs.

Implement the 'Gradient Scrim' rule heavily: Any thumbnail image with text/badges floating over it MUST have an `expo-linear-gradient` scrim (transparent to dark) underneath the text for guaranteed contrast.
Make the 'Download' action visually distinct in the Template Detail screen. Keep it sticky above the bottom safe area.
Ensure 'Free' and 'Premium' tabs on the Home screen use a segmented control pattern inside a frosted glass sticky header.
For the download progress indicator, use a dynamic bottom sheet or an overlay banner that doesn't block navigation.
